Hi Gabriela! How is Paris? Have you ever seen the Eiffel Tower in real life?
Yes! It is amazing. I have already visited a museum, but I have not gone to the top of the tower yet.
That sounds like an unforgettable experience! What was the highlight of your trip?
The gift shop! I have just captured the memory in my journal. I want to remember it forever.
I am so happy for you. Do you miss home a little?
A little! But this is the best trip so far, and I have done everything in English!
Have you ever traveled abroad?
The highlight was an unforgettable experience.
I want to capture every memory in my journal.

Hey Gabriela, it's Lucas! How is Paris? I want to know everything about your trip so far. Have you visited the Eiffel Tower yet? I hope you have already taken a lot of photos! My brother just came back from Rome, and he says travel is the best experience in the world. So tell me, what is the highlight of your trip? Have you ever tried a real French croissant? And what about the museums; have you seen any famous paintings yet? I am so happy for you. This is an unforgettable trip, and I do not want you to miss a single thing. Send me a long message with all your amazing memories. I cannot wait to hear it. Talk soon!

My trip to Paris has been amazing so far. It is an unforgettable experience, and I want to capture every memory. I have already visited so many places. I have seen the Eiffel Tower, and I have walked along the river. I have already been to a big museum, and I have looked at famous paintings. The highlight of my trip was the gift shop, where I bought presents for my family. I have just written three postcards to my friends. I have not gone to the top of the tower yet, but I will go tomorrow. I have made new memories every day. I miss my family a little, but this is the best trip of my life, and I have done everything in English!

First, you think about the highlights of your trip. Next, you say what you have already done, like, I have already visited the museum. After that, you say what you have not done yet, like, I have not seen the tower yet. Then, you ask a friend, have you ever traveled abroad? Finally, you share your favorite memory of the trip.
